items.title: Stock Market Today: Indexes End Lower; Moderna Dives On FDA Memo; Synopsys, Nvidia Jump (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow fell on the stock market today. Moderna skidded after an FDA memo linked Covid vaccines to deaths. A gold stock cleared an entry.

items.title: AMGN Up Almost 16% in a Month: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
items.description: Amgen's nearly 16% surge follows strong Q3 results, raised sales guidance and growing momentum across key drugs and biosimilars.

items.title: 5 Healthcare Names to Watch as Sector Rotation Is in Full Swing
items.description: The healthcare sector is outperforming the broader market and tech sector in Q4, confirming a substantial capital shift into the defensive industry.
